stories.headline: Musk’s Net Worth Down More Than $50 Billion Ahead Of SpaceX IPO - Forbes
stories.summary: A stock debut for Musk’s aerospace firm should make him the first trillionaire, even as Tesla’s latest slide cut into his fortune.

stories.headline: De’Aaron Fox, What Were You Thinking? - Defector
stories.summary: If OG Anunoby’s miraculous put-back of Jalen Brunson’s long three is the Hand of God, maybe the play before it was the Brain of Squirrel. It was Spurs guard De’Aaron Fox, currently finishing up his ninth year in the NBA, who made a pre-rookie mistake that all…

stories.headline: Stocks rebound, fueled by chip stocks, but gains limited on new Trump Iran threat: Live updates - CNBC
stories.summary: A rout in chip stocks and ramp-up in Middle East tensions pulled down the major averages on Wednesday.

stories.headline: Former ‘60 Minutes’ Staffers Unload on Bari Weiss: ‘Everything She’s Touched Has Turned to S—’ - Variety
stories.summary: As Bari Weiss lays waste to ’60 Minutes,’ six former staffers sound off on the damage she’s inflicted upon the crown jewel of CBS News.
